strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the minimum experience bar
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP generators, agentic workflows) shows active engagement with the AI tooling space
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective (open-source founder), community talks, and workshop delivery
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a related technical field; holds two undergraduate degrees but no Master's or PhD
AI involvement is recent (6 months), tooling-level, and lacks demonstrated ownership of AI products or platforms at scale
No evidence of director-level IC scope, strategic customer advisory experience, or external recognition as an AI thought leader
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically well-rounded engineer whose career demonstrates strong craftsmanship, broad stack fluency, and an entrepreneurial streak, but the role targets a director-level individual contributor recognized for AI expertise and capable of advising strategic customers and shaping cloud-AI product vision. His AI exposure is too recent and too narrow — MCP tooling contributions over six months do not constitute demonstrated AI product or platform leadership — and there is no evidence of the external thought leadership, senior advisory work, or advanced AI/ML depth the role explicitly prefers. He is a strong mid-senior engineer but does not yet fit the seniority or specialization profile this position demands.
